zh-cn.campaign_starfarers_tooltip:
为了方便熟悉游戏机制而设计的小型剧本。

此剧本为碧蓝档案同人
zh-cn.campaign1_start_default_tooltip:
以碧蓝档案的老师身份，与%%factionName_Utnapishtim%%的领航员们一同开始游戏。
身为老师，玩家有义务管理%%factionName_Utnapishtim%%阵营，有义务维护学生们的身心健康。
限制：玩家不可参与战斗（未实装）
玩家的立绘和名字会被更改
zh-cn.campaign1_start_student_tooltip:
（未实装）以奇沃托斯的学生身份，与生命守护者的领航员们一同开始游戏。
身为学生，玩家可以参与战斗。
限制：玩家的种族模板会被改为--学生模板--
--学生模板--：--模板描述--
zh-cn.campaign1_start_debug_tooltip:
%%campaign1_start_default_tooltip%%

DEBUG剧本将会往游戏内额外添加本不该出现的东西
zh-cn.Campaign1_students_charCard_comment:
角色卡条目取自酒馆的BA角色卡：[ブルアカ/同人] 蔚藍檔案 基沃托斯(Kivotos) Ver2.00
暂未获得作者授权
zh-cn.tooltip_kivotos_halo_effect:
光环：MP不会自然回复，获得等同于MP上限/2的全类型伤害减免。
上述效果未实装
zh-cn.humanRaceAddon_Android_Sirin_tooltip:
作为轻量且能被批量生产的战斗仿生人，%%humanRaceAddon_Android_Sirin%%尽管也复刻了人类的大脑结构，但只在外观上做到了人形，一动起来就会透露出不自然感。
作为轻量化的代价，%%humanRaceAddon_Android_Sirin%%的持续作战能力较低。
CON-2 基础服从度+2
zh-cn.humanRace_android_complex_tooltip:
%%humanRace_android_simple_tooltip%%
相较通常仿生人，高等仿生人在更多方面贴近人类，相对的维护需求也更高。
zh-cn.humanRace_android_simple_tooltip:
被制造的人形机械，它们的存在意义常为填补某些特定需求。
大部分仿生人没有维生需求。

en-us.campaign1_start_debug_tooltip:
%%campaign1_start_default_tooltip%%

DEBUG Start will add things to the map that are not supposed to be there... for now.
en-us.campaign1_start_student_tooltip: (WIP) Begin the game as a Kivotos Student alongside the Utnapishtim crew
en-us.campaign_starfarers_tooltip:
A small scenario designed to help familiarize you with the game mechanics.

This scenario is a parody of Blue Archive.
en-us.campaign1_start_default_tooltip:
Start the game as the Sensei from Blue Archive, along with the navigators of %%factionName_Utnapishtim%%.
As Sensei, the player need to to manage %%factionName_Utnapishtim%% faction and maintain the physical and mental wellbeing of all students.
Restrictions: The player cannot participate in combat (not yet implemented).
The player's portrait and name will be altered.
en-us.tooltip_kivotos_halo_effect:
Halo: MP will not regenerate naturally, gain all-type damage reduction equal to MP cap / 2. 
The aforementioned effects are not implemented.
en-us.humanRaceAddon_Android_Sirin_tooltip:
As a lightweight combat android that can be mass-produced, %%humanRaceAddon_Android_Sirin%%, despite replicating the human brain structure, only achieves a human-like appearance, revealing an unnaturalness in movement. 
As a trade-off for being lightweight, the sustained combat capability of %%humanRaceAddon_Android_Sirin%% is low.
CON-2, Base Obedience +2
en-us.humanRace_android_complex_tooltip:
%%humanRace_android_simple_tooltip%%
Compared to ordinary androids, advanced androids are closer to humans in more ways, and require relatively more maintenance.
en-us.humanRace_android_simple_tooltip:
Humanoid machine created to fulfill specific needs.
Most androids do not have daily needs.
en-us.Campaign1_students_charCard_comment:
Character card entry taken from tavern's BA character card: [Blue Archive/Doujin] Blue Archive Kivotos Ver2.00
Author's permission has not yet been obtained
